message:
fix(connector,remote): extract replay helpers and length-prefix content hashing

rollout_state.rs:
- Extract replay_mismatch(), replay_value_json(), replay_option_string(),
  and replay_cancel_phase() helpers to reduce boilerplate in verify_replay()
- Each PersistError::ReplayMismatch construction now uses the helper
  instead of inline struct literals, improving readability

idempotency_store.rs:
- Replace pipe-delimited content_hash() encoding with length-prefixed
  format using (len as u64).to_le_bytes() before each field
- This prevents delimiter-collision ambiguity where a payload_hash or
  status string containing "|" could produce hash collisions across
  distinct entry sets
- Same hardening pattern applied to universal_verifier_sdk in the
  previous commit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
